children.heading: Monitoring program for unregulated contaminants
children.label: a Monitoring program for unregulated contaminants

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Administrator shall include each substance described in paragraph (2) in the fifth publication of the list of unregulated contaminants to be monitored under .section 300j–4(a)(2)(B)(i) of title 42

children.label: A
children.text: for which a method to measure the level in drinking water has been validated by the Administrator; and

children.label: B
children.text: that are not subject to a national primary drinking water regulation.

children.heading: Exception
children.label: 3 Exception
children.text: The perfluoroalkyl and polyfluoroalkyl substances and classes of perfluoroalkyl and polyfluoroalkyl substances included in the list of unregulated contaminants to be monitored under under paragraph (1) shall not count towards the limit of 30 unregulated contaminants to be monitored by public water systems under that section.section 300j–4(a)(2)(B)(i) of title 42

children.label: A
children.text: require public water systems serving more than 10,000 persons to monitor for the substances described in subsection (a)(2);

children.label: B
children.text: subject to paragraph (2) and the availability of appropriations, require public water systems serving not fewer than 3,300 and not more than 10,000 persons to monitor for the substances described in subsection (a)(2); and

children.label: C
children.text: subject to paragraph (2) and the availability of appropriations, ensure that only a representative sample of public water systems serving fewer than 3,300 persons are required to monitor for the substances described in subsection (a)(2).

children.heading: Requirement
children.label: 2 Requirement
children.text: If the Administrator determines that there is not sufficient laboratory capacity to carry out the monitoring required under subparagraphs (B) and (C) of paragraph (1), the Administrator may waive the monitoring requirements in those subparagraphs.

children.label: A
children.text: funds made available pursuant to subsection (a)(2)(H) or subsection (j)(5) of ; orsection 300j–4 of title 42

children.label: B
children.text: any other funds made available for that purpose.
